title: Games News by Elusion Works
summary: Public-safe game development, gaming, review, and preview news surfaces powered by a separate scheduled pipeline.
notice: The page is wired for generated feed outputs. The first scheduled games runs still need to publish their initial items into this manifest.

feeds.title: Game Dev News
feeds.summary: Engine releases, tooling, middleware, store policy, production craft, and the business of making games.

feeds.title: Gaming News
feeds.summary: Platform moves, major announcements, releases, notable studio stories, and wider games industry coverage.

feeds.title: Games Reviews
feeds.summary: Final verdicts, scored criticism, and notable critical consensus from major games outlets.

feeds.title: Games Previews
feeds.summary: Hands-on impressions, early verdicts, showcase reactions, and first-look coverage before final review.
